title: First Discovery Fund: Matbench Descriptor Transfer External Review Package

The scope is limited to the cited public targets and the recorded evidence package.
claim: The measured public computational_materials_property_data target-outcome residual for HARD-GEN-MATBENCH-DESCRIPTOR-TRANSFER-SIGNIFICANCE-GENERATOR-OUTPUT-01 has scientific significance: public materials descriptor transfer residual survives composition formula size target family split leakage and shuffled target controls changes interpretation of the bounded measured target slice by surviving baseline, rival, holdout, replay, counterexample, recurrence, and mechanism pressure checks. limitations: Source Product limitation copied verbatim: "The evidence is bounded to generated formal object families and replayed Product artifacts."
For this Corpus result, the public claim remains bounded to the cited Matbench/public-materials target refs and recorded Product evidence package.
Product runtime scalar replay is exact, but raw-data scientific reproduction failed: the raw Matbench source loads and proxy checks run, while descriptor-transfer scientific inputs remain missing.
Inspection of the Product source classifies the Product values as runtime-derived deterministic generator scalars, not raw-data-derived scientific outputs.
Domain scientific significance pressure failed gates: no_anti_discovery_claim_text.
This package makes only a bounded internal evidence claim and avoids prohibited public overclaim categories.

disclaimer: Downgraded historical Product evidence package. It does not claim external validation, external adoption, prize-level significance, broad intelligence, legal authority, medical authority, unsafe capability, universal truth, or current externally-review-ready discovery status.
nextExternalReviewStep: Do not send this bundle as an externally-review-ready discovery candidate. A future package would need to supply the missing raw-data scientific inputs and independently reproduce the descriptor-transfer result from public Matbench data.
reviewerFacingBoundedClaim: The public package records a Product-generated Matbench/materials candidate package where matbench_descriptor_transfer_significance_generator-output-01 has measured outcome 0.72, residual magnitude 0.21, and three recorded simple controls. Those values are exactly replayable as Product runtime scalars but failed raw-data scientific reproduction, so this is not an externally-review-ready discovery claim.
majorCaveats: No independent external validation or adoption is claimed.
